name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Miramar, FL location of 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2011 Palm Ave, offering quick title loans for emergency cash needs.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans is located at 2011 Palm Ave Bay A in Miramar, FL, serving the surrounding community with convenient access. This standalone storefront operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 5 PM, and is closed on Sundays. Walk-in customers are welcomed without appointments.

At the Miramar location, the team provides title-secured loans based on the equity in your vehicle. Call 786-788-7567 to discuss loan amounts, repayment terms, and documentation requirements, or visit in person. This Miramar branch specializes in fast processing for residents facing unexpected expenses who need rapid cash access.

When visiting, bring your vehicle title, valid government-issued ID, and proof of residency or insurance. Title loans work well for Miramar residents with limited credit options seeking an alternative lending source. 5 Star Car Title Loans is known for straightforward, no-nonsense processing.
address: 2011 Palm Ave Bay A, Miramar, FL 33025

company_info.headquarters: 2011 Palm Ave Bay A, Miramar, FL 33025

pros: No prepayment penalties—borrowers can pay off loans early without additional fees
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
Allows borrowers to keep and drive their vehicle while using it as collateral
Wide geographic availability across approximately 18 states with multiple physical locations
Accepts alternative vehicle collateral including motorcycles and semi-trucks
Loan amounts up to $50,000 for larger cash needs beyond typical emergency loans
256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for online applications
cons: Interest rates and APR not disclosed on website; title loans typically carry significantly higher costs than traditional personal loans
Risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed, putting primary transportation at risk
Loan terms and availability vary substantially by state, limiting accessibility in some regions
No mention of credit counseling, financial education, or alternative products for borrowers seeking to improve credit standing
best_for: Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs and fair/poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Borrowers facing urgent expenses (rent, medical bills, car repairs) who need same-day or next-day funding
Consumers with significant vehicle equity who need access to larger loan amounts ($10,000-$50,000)
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best suited for vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need immediate cash and have significant equity in their vehicle. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost borrowing products with APRs typically ranging from 100-300% annually, and borrowers risk losing their vehicle if they cannot maintain payments—this should only be considered after exploring lower-cost alternatives.
services: Vehicle title loans with loan amounts $100-$50,000
Motorcycle title loans and semi-truck title loans
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments and up to 24-month repayment terms
Same-day loan funding for approved applicants
In-person application at physical locations across 18 states
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2011 Palm Ave, Miramar, FL. Quick title loans for emergencies.
